Package and test pipeline · End to end · Testing guide · Development · Help · GitLab

content.text:
End-to-end (E2E) pipelines are integral to modern software development, encompassing the entire process from code commit to deployment and monitoring. They ensure that all components of an application work cohesively, facilitating continuous integration and delivery. Below are several authoritative and recent sources that provide in-depth insights into E2E pipelines:

1. **Optimizing Our E2E Pipeline | Engineering at Slack**  
   This article discusses how Slack's DevXP team optimized their E2E testing pipeline, reducing build times and eliminating redundant processes to enhance efficiency. ([slack.engineering](https://slack.engineering/speedup-e2e-testing/?utm_source=openai))

2. **End-to-end Testing | GitLab Docs**  
   GitLab's documentation offers a comprehensive guide on E2E testing strategies, including setup, execution, and best practices for testing GitLab itself. ([docs.gitlab.com](https://docs.gitlab.com/development/testing_guide/end_to_end/?utm_source=openai))

3. **End-to-end Pipeline Monitoring | The GitLab Handbook**  
   This resource provides an overview of GitLab's E2E monitoring tools and practices, detailing how they monitor test pipelines across different environments. ([handbook.gitlab.com](https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/engineering/testing/end-to-end-pipeline-monitoring/?utm_source=openai))

4. **Building End-to-End DevOps Pipelines: Best Practices for CI/CD Success**  
   CloudBees discusses best practices for developing, building, testing, and deploying software through E2E DevOps pipelines, emphasizing the importance of selecting appropriate tools for specific use cases. ([cloudbees.com](https://www.cloudbees.com/blog/building-e2e-devops-pipelines?utm_source=openai))

5. **E2E DevOps Pipeline with GitLab - IBM Mediacenter**  
   This video demonstrates the implementation of an E2E DevOps pipeline using GitLab, showcasing integration with various tools to create an automated CI/CD pipeline. ([mediacenter.ibm.com](https://mediacenter.ibm.com/media/E2E%2BDevOps%2BPipeline%2Bwith%2BGitLab/1_gds3ux8t?utm_source=openai))

6. **Package and Test Pipeline · End to End · Testing Guide · Development · Help · GitLab**  
   GitLab's guide details the `e2e:package-and-test` child pipeline, which is central to E2E testing for the GitLab platform, including setup and execution. ([genboree.org](https://genboree.org/gitlab/help/development/testing_guide/end_to_end/package_and_test_pipeline.md?utm_source=openai))

7. **Azure-DevOps Pipeline - Wait for E2E Tests Pipeline to Pass Before Deploy to Next Environment - Stack Overflow**  
   A Stack Overflow discussion addressing how to configure Azure DevOps pipelines to wait for E2E tests to pass before deploying to subsequent environments. ([stackoverflow.com](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/66504749/azure-devops-pipeline-wait-for-e2e-tests-pipeline-to-pass-before-deploy-to-nex?utm_source=openai))

8. **What is End-to-End (E2E) Testing? Definition, Benefits & Best Practices**  
   Techopedia provides a definition and overview of E2E testing, including its benefits and best practices for implementation. ([techopedia.com](https://www.techopedia.com/definition/7035/end-to-end-test?utm_source=openai))

9. **Android Testing Guide: Unit, UI, E2E, Automation & Device Testing | Appcircle**  
   This guide offers insights into E2E testing for Android applications, discussing strategies and best practices for testing the entire user journey. ([appcircle.io](https://appcircle.io/guides/android/android-app-testing?utm_source=openai))

10. **E2E-AT: A Unified Framework for Tackling Uncertainty in Task-aware End-to-end Learning**  
    An academic paper presenting a unified framework for addressing uncertainties in task-aware E2E learning, proposing end-to-end adversarial training (E2E-AT) as a solution. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2312.10587?utm_source=openai))

11. **Huawei E2E DevOps Practice: Managing Requirements_Best Practices_CodeArts Req-Huawei Cloud**  
    Huawei's best practices for managing requirements in E2E DevOps pipelines, focusing on agile development methodologies and implementation frameworks. ([support.huaweicloud.com](https://support.huaweicloud.com/intl/en-us/bestpractice-projectman/codeartsreq_practice_1037.html?utm_source=openai))

12. **Auto-Remediation Pipelines for Autoscaling Groups Validated via E2E Chaos Tests - UMA Technology**  
    A discussion on implementing auto-remediation pipelines for autoscaling groups, validated through E2E chaos tests to ensure system resilience. ([umatechnology.org](https://umatechnology.org/auto-remediation-pipelines-for-autoscaling-groups-validated-via-e2e-chaos-tests/?utm_source=openai))

These resources offer a blend of practical guides, best practices, and theoretical frameworks to enhance the understanding and implementation of E2E pipelines in various development environments.
